texto: Really good writing has purpose and that purpose should be to shape other minds to desire truth and a more noble purpose in life and to become more thoughtful and knowledgable about important things like being kind and loving towards all living beings on our planet and not just humans but all animals.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Susan Waterfield: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Really good writing has purpose and that purpose should be to shape other minds to desire truth a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, compassion, existence pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de existence e meaning.
